category_sources: Official util-linux README describes it as a collection of Linux utilities.
source_facts.description says util-linux is a collection of Linux utilities.
display_name_sources: Official util-linux repository and README use the name util-linux.
docs_sources: Official README provides project overview, build, release, source-code, and support information.
Official util-linux repository contains a Documentation directory for project documentation.
repo_sources: Official util-linux README lists git.kernel.org/pub/scm/utils/util-linux/util-linux.git as the primary source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Linux utilities collection.
source_facts.executables lists many system administration and core utility commands such as mount, fdisk, lsblk, dmesg, and uuidgen.
